title: Ubiquiti UCG-Fiber, UniFi Cloud Gateway Fiber
description: UCG-Fiber expands the range of compact UniFi Cloud Gateway series. The router features (1) WAN 10Gbps port, (2) 10Gbps SFP+ ports (1x WAN, 1x LAN), and (4) LAN 1/2.5Gbps ports, including one PoE-OUT port supporting PoE+ 802.3af/at. Its compact yet powerful design supports multi-WAN functionality, including load balancing, and also features IDS/IPS support. The router is equipped with various VPN types , including site-to-site VPN With the integrated UniFi Network application , you can manage 50+ UniFi devices and serve up to 500+ connected client devices. For video recording storage, the router can be expanded with an NVMe SSD of up to 2TB via a dedicated slot. It also includes a 0.96" status display. Power is supplied via a 54V/1.1A power adapter, which is included in the package 5Gbps routing with IDS/IPS support Supported UniFi applications: Network, Protect, Access, Talk, Connect Multi-WAN + load balancing 0.96" LCM display Device Patch cable Power adapter 54V/1.1A
